subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #060 The Immortality of the Spirit (1)
subcodes.first_line: Having established the existence of the human spirit, we must now establish its immortality.
subcodes.first_line_orig: پس اثبات روح شد که روح انسانی موجود است حال باید اثبات بقای روح را کرد
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
